name: Dana Collier
description: I had a great experience with the All The Rage Carpet Cleaning team. They cleaned our air ducts and were right on time with excellent communication and availability. I would absolutely use them again for any of the services they offer. Reasonable price too!

name: Erika Lawson
description: I had extraordinary service with All The Rage Carpet Cleaning. I would recommend this company 100% to friends and family who are looking for true professionals who care about details. Thank you, All The Rage, for your outstanding work.

name: Monica Greer
description: I cannot say enough positive things about the All The Rage team. They helped me and my client last minute and cleaned a 5,124 SF building (interior and exterior) in one day. They worked incredibly hard. The property was in rough shape after a break-in, and the transformation was amazing. My partners and I will use All The Rage Carpet Cleaning for all our commercial cleaning needs going forward.

name: Caroline Vance
description: Efficient, quick, and friendly. All The Rage responded immediately and scheduled a time that worked for our home listing. We had several old pet stains and were not sure they would come out. Our carpets have never looked this clean in the four years we have lived here. Highly recommend this company.

name: Trevor Miles
description: Thanks to the All The Rage crew for bringing life back to my hardwood floors. They gave the floors a deep cleaning and restored the natural shine. Professional service and helpful advice on how to keep them looking new. I truly appreciate the quality work.

name: Naomi Barrett
description: We love using All The Rage Carpet Cleaning. We have been using them to clean our carpets and furniture for over three years now. They do an excellent job, make great recommendations, and consistently deliver strong results. Their prices are very reasonable, and I highly recommend them.

name: Kyle Donnelly
description: I am extremely pleased with All The Rage Carpet Cleaning. We have three messy boys who have stained our white carpet with food, drinks, slime, and everything else you can imagine. I did not think the carpet would ever look new again, but after the appointment it was white and spotless. The team worked fast, the carpet dried quickly, and customer service was excellent from start to finish.

name: Jenna Whitaker
description: I am so pleased with my experience with All The Rage Carpet Cleaning. Our carpets had some really rough stains from the kids, and they look great now. The office team was very kind and made the whole process simple. I will definitely use All The Rage again for future cleaning needs.

name: Paige Holloway
description: All The Rage cleaned all of our carpets today. They had pet and kid stains and were in bad shape. The technician did an amazing job, and we are planning routine cleanings moving forward. He also taught us how to care for the carpets between visits. The expertise and professionalism were outstanding.

name: Marissa Kendall
description: We just had All The Rage Carpet Cleaning clean carpet in two rooms of our home, and we are very pleased. From getting an estimate and scheduling to the cleaning appointment itself, the experience was fast and easy. The results were excellent, and their extra sanitizing process was a great bonus. We definitely recommend them and will use them again when needed.
